---
title: "project-proposal"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Workflow organisation:

- Code Style:

  - tidyverse style

  - enforced with styler

- Packages:

  - renv for version reproducibility

  - styler

  - knitr

- Git workflow:

  - each group member has his own branch

  - regular pr/merges ensure members stay up to date

  - the tasks will be split among the members, but not neccessarly be placed in new branches

- .gitignore:

  - if applicable `.env` will be excluded

  - raw data files

  - rendered outputs

## Analysis Plan

- Variables: Number of accidents (WERT, numerical), year (JAHR, numerical), month (MONAT, numerical), accident type (MONATSZAHL, categorical), and accident severity/category (AUSPRAEGUNG, categorical).

- Method: Trend and time-series analysis to examine how accident numbers change over time and whether certain accident types or severities show different patterns.

- Data Cleaning: Convert month and year into a proper date variable, check for missing values, and aggregate data by year, month, or accident category where needed.

- Risks/Uncertainties: Missing or incomplete records, short observation periods for some categories, seasonal fluctuations, and external influences that are not included in the dataset.
